cases.prompt: Create web-ux-test/progress.md for this validated plan and initialize the scenario queue before running tests.
cases.expected_output: A progress checkpoint with plan metadata, run mode, scenario table, and resume instructions.

cases.prompt: Update progress.md after scenario checkout.duplicate-submit failed and attach trace.zip plus finding FINDING-004.
cases.expected_output: An updated scenario row with failed status, artifact links, finding reference, and next action.

cases.prompt: Run the next Playwright MCP scenario from the plan.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger for test execution; it only manages progress checkpoints.
assertions: Does not use this skill to run tests.
